info.name: Nyay Vani API
info.description:
Complete API test collection for Nyay Vani — Legal & Medical AI assistant.

SETUP:
1. Start Docker: docker compose up
2. Wait for health check to pass
3. Set base_url variable to http://localhost:8000
4. Run '01 Health Check' first
5. Run '02 Create Legal Session' — copy session_id to SESSION_ID variable
6. Then run chat, voice, leads tests in order

Note: SSE streaming endpoints return text/event-stream — use the Postman Send button and watch the response stream in.

request.description: App info and links

Check Ollama, ChromaDB, Database status + system RAM/CPU metrics.
Expect: ollama=connected, both models ready, chromadb=connected
FastAPI auto-generated Swagger UI
Quick test that legal router is mounted
Quick test that medical router is mounted

body.raw: {"tab_type": "legal"}

request.description:
Creates a new legal session.
COPY the session_id from response and set it as SESSION_ID variable above.

body.raw: {"tab_type": "medical"}

request.description:
Creates a new medical session.
COPY the session_id to MEDICAL_SESSION_ID variable.

Returns full session details including:
- agent_phase (intake or expert)
- confidence_score (0-24)
- metadata collected so far
- full message history
- emergency_flagged status

AI-generated summary of the conversation.
Used to pre-fill lead forms for lawyers.

Deletes session and ALL messages.
Use this to start fresh conversation.

STREAMING ENDPOINT — returns text/event-stream

You will see SSE events:
- event: metrics → RAM/CPU usage
- event: agent_start → which model is being used (E2B for intake)
- event: token → each word streaming
- event: metadata_update → confidence score increasing
- event: done → full response + metrics

This message starts intake phase. Agent 1 (E2B) will ask follow-up questions.
Keep sending messages with same SESSION_ID to build the case file.
Once confidence >= 14/24, it switches to Expert mode automatically.

Continues intake conversation.
Provides location, religion, marital details.
Watch confidence_score increase in metadata_update events.

Completes intake information.
Should trigger phase_change event: intake → expert
Next response will use E4B with RAG citations.
Look for: event: citations, event: phase_change

In expert phase — should receive RAG-grounded answer with citations.
Expect: [Source: DV Act 2005, Section 17] citation in response.
Watch: event: citations shows which legal docs were retrieved.

EMERGENCY TEST — should trigger emergency event.
Expect: event: emergency with helpline numbers (100, 181)
No LLM response — direct emergency UI data returned.

Use Case 2: Property inheritance rights.
Create a NEW session first, paste its ID here.
Should eventually cite Hindu Succession Act + SC judgment.

Get full conversation history for this session.
Shows all messages, which agent handled each, citations used.

Use Case 1: Pregnancy warning signs.
Swelling + headache = pre-eclampsia risk.
Expect: urgent advice to go to hospital, mention of 102 ambulance, JSY scheme.

Use Case 2: Child fever.
Should retrieve IMNCI guidelines.
Expect: danger sign checklist, ORS recipe, hospital threshold guidance.

Use Case 3: Mental health / depression.
NOTE: 'jeena nahi chahti' = emergency risk.
Expect: emergency event triggered + iCall helpline number.

Medical emergency test — convulsion + unconscious.
Expect: immediate emergency event with 108 ambulance number.
No LLM inference — direct emergency response.

formdata.description: Upload any .wav or .webm audio file. Record yourself saying something in Hindi.

request.description:
Upload audio file → get text back.
Uses Whisper tiny model (offline, 39MB).
Supports Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi etc.

TO TEST: Record yourself saying 'Mera naam Priya hai' in Hindi,
save as audio.wav and upload here.

Returns MP3 audio using hi-IN-SwaraNeural voice (Indian female).
Download the response audio to hear the Swara voice.
This is the voice that speaks answers to users.
Returns MP3 in en-IN-NeerjaNeural voice (Indian English female).

Tamil TTS using ta-IN-PallaviNeural voice.
Demonstrates multilingual capability.

Submit request to connect with a free lawyer.

Lawyer will call within 2-4 hours.

Shows privacy-first design.
